hero.name: Lee Ho Sing Cyrus
hero.title: Full Stack Web Developer
hero.tagline: Full-stack developer who excels where frontend and backend must work as one — integration, business logic, and delivery under pressure.

paragraphs: Full-stack web developer with 5+ years of experience building production systems in Laravel, Vue, and JavaScript. Core strengths include FE/BE integration and delivery under pressure.

Selected work includes KNSM, a Po Leung Kuk kindergarten platform used by 20+ schools; DrugInSport's 10k+ drug-data import workflows; and HKAB's 16-server operations revamp, cutting key procedures from 20+ minutes to 5–10 minutes.
Current work also includes leading AI agent adoption at FirmStudio, using AI to remove friction while keeping clear requirements and human communication at the centre of delivery.
highlights: Full-stack integration — developed KNSM, a multi-campus platform serving 20+ schools
Backend & crisis delivery — HKAB ops turnaround (20+ min to 5–10 min); DrugInSport 10k+ import
AI with judgment — lead AI agent rollout; clear requirements and communication over blind automation

sections.title: Where the value sits
sections.text: Full-stack web developer with 5+ years of experience in Laravel, Vue, and JavaScript production systems. The clearest value lies in FE/BE integration, backend problem-solving, and delivery under pressure — not in competing with specialists on depth alone. Selected work includes KNSM, a Po Leung Kuk kindergarten platform serving 20+ schools; DrugInSport's 10,000+ drug-record import pipeline; and HKAB's 16-server on-premise operations revamp, where key procedures were cut from 20+ minutes to 5–10 minutes.

sections.title: A complex school platform
sections.text: KNSM is one of the strongest full-stack examples in the portfolio: a Po Leung Kuk kindergarten platform built with Vue 3 and Laravel, serving 20+ schools. Reportedly one of FirmStudio's most complex projects, it required turning unclear early requirements into workable flows with designers and PMs, then maintaining client trust through frequent demos and steady delivery — earning praise from the client and school principals.

sections.title: Backend depth & crisis delivery
sections.text: In recent FirmStudio projects, frontend colleagues usually own the UI while my work focuses more on backend logic, integration, operations, and delivery risk. That built deep backend experience over time: DrugInSport's large-scale import pipeline, HKAB's on-premise ops work, and production deployment scripts. HKAB was a troubled takeover — severely behind, close to legal escalation — restored through fast execution, tight PM reporting, and candid client communication.

sections.title: AI adoption at FirmStudio
sections.text: Since 2026, responsibilities at FirmStudio have also included AI agent evaluation and standardized Cursor Skills for the team, bringing AI-assisted workflows into daily development and collaboration.

aiEra.kicker: On work, tools, and what remains human
aiEra.title: In the AI Era
paragraphs: In this period of rapid AI change, much of the conversation is about replacing labour or reshaping habits. Equally important remains clear human communication and well-defined requirements. AI is a powerful assistant, but it needs clear direction to do the right work.

Software development is no longer only about typing code by hand — that is what AI is best at taking over. The role is to understand what clients actually need, design UI and workflows that solve real problems, and build systems that help people who are not AI-savvy work more efficiently and comfortably.

AI removes friction. It does not replace the thinking and communication that people remain responsible for. The space that opens up is for sound system design, judgment, and the work only humans choose to do.

experience.summary: Full-stack developer building multi-tenant internal systems, client web applications, and production operation tooling.
bullets: KNSM (2024 — maintenance): full-stack development of an internal Po Leung Kuk kindergarten platform used by 20+ schools; Vue 3 frontend and Laravel backend.
DrugInSport (2025): built all JavaScript (jQuery) and backend (Laravel 11) for ADOHK's public anti-doping drug lookup; 10,000+ drug records with chunked Excel import and memory optimization.
HKAB (2022–2023; maintenance; ops script revamp in 2025): built member area permissions and revamped 16-server on-premise operation scripts, cutting key procedures from 20+ minutes to 5–10 minutes.
Led AI agent adoption (2026): evaluated agent solutions, gathered team feedback, and rolled out Cursor Skills for code scanning, document generation, and plan-mode workflows.

experience.summary: Full-stack web development across loyalty, e-commerce, booking, and POS-integrated online shop modules.
bullets: Built DentalMiles, a dental loyalty and booking platform covering points redemption, online booking, Miles Rewards, and eShop features.
Developed HIPPOS online shop module for multiple retailers, integrating POS APIs, inventory sync, automatic discounts, promo codes, and online payments.

projects.title: KNSM — Po Leung Kuk Kindergarten Management System
projects.description: 2024 — Present (maintenance). Full-stack internal platform for Po Leung Kuk kindergartens and nurseries, serving 20+ campuses with student management, fee billing, reports, and Oracle AR/RA exports.

projects.title: DrugInSport — Anti-Doping Drug Database
projects.description: 2025. Public anti-doping drug lookup for ADOHK. UI by design team; I built all JavaScript and backend logic, including a 10,000+ drug-record import pipeline with chunked processing, memory tuning, approval flow, and scheduled launch.

projects.title: HKAB — Member Area & On-Premise Operations
projects.description: 2022–2023 development; maintenance ongoing; operation script revamp in 2025. Member portal with granular permissions plus 16-server on-premise operations, covering CMS file sync, DB replication, backup, failover, restart procedures, and operation guide documentation.

projects.title: HIPPOS — Online Shop Module
projects.description: Online shop module for HIPPOS, an iPad retail management platform. Built multi-tenant storefronts with POS API integration, inventory and membership sync, discount rules, promo codes, and payment processing.

projects.title: DentalMiles — Loyalty & Booking Platform
projects.description: Dental loyalty and booking platform combining points redemption, DentalMiles to CDE conversion, online booking with quota rules, Miles Rewards, and eShop features in one web system.

education.institution: The Hong Kong Institute of Vocational Education (Tsing Yi)
